fixtures.intent: High-volume mixed-topology workload for stress/perf and graph-shape regressions.
expected_failure_signatures: triage latency spikes or timeout under large input
graph node/edge count drift from expected topology
critical-path ordering instability across repeated runs

fixtures.intent: Pathological dependency structures to exercise cycle detection, dangling edges, and depth extremes.
expected_failure_signatures: cycle detector misses overlapping or long cycles
planner hangs or explodes on deep chain/fan-in/fan-out
panic when resolving dangling dependency targets

fixtures.intent: Malformed and extreme metadata values to verify parser robustness and normalization.
expected_failure_signatures: parser crash on malformed date/priority fields
invalid UTF-8/text handling in output rendering
normalization drift for duplicate labels and empty fields

fixtures.intent: Medium-large deterministic stress fixture used for conformance parity and cycle behavior assertions.
expected_failure_signatures: triage quick_ref totals diverge from expected values
graph edge count drift under stable fixture

fixtures.intent: Small adversarial stress fixture for cycle/cascade edge behavior in robot outputs.
expected_failure_signatures: cycle warning suggestions missing expected members

fixtures.intent: Compact adversarial parity fixture used against legacy outputs for behavioral regressions.
expected_failure_signatures: top pick IDs diverge from legacy fixture contract
history/diff envelope regressions under adversarial graph
